name: Spiny Water Flea
description: A much more vicious upper-yard version of the water flea. Fast, numerous, and dangerous in swarms, it is one of the nastiest surprises in late-game dives.
respawnInfo: 2 days by default. In the Undershed it takes 1 day.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: While looping at high speed, it cuts in and bites the moment it lines up.
attacks.howToAvoid: Climb onto a leaf or leave the water if possible; underwater, block with a spear or dagger.
attacks.notes: It uses the same basic bite as a normal water flea, only much faster.

behavior: It swims at high speed in large loops, patrolling the Upper Pond and late-game puddles in dense groups. Its moveset is simple, but speed, numbers, and relentless pressure make up for that.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and, simply through swarm behavior, can become lethal very quickly. One is not impressive; a group absolutely is.
interactionWithCreatures: It has few notable interactions with other creatures because it usually lives fairly isolated in its puddles and channels.
strategy: The best answer is often avoiding them unless you need the drops. If you fight, bring a highly upgraded spear and use any nearby ledge, leaf, or dry footing to break the swarm.
